statement.en: LARGE SCALE SIGNATURE OF UNSTEADY FLOW SEPARATION OVER AN OSCILLATING CUBE WITH ROUNDED EDGES

proposer: Antoine Myskiw, Yann Haffner, Christophe Sicot et al.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Paper title references experimental fluid dynamics (oscillating cube, flow separation) but is categorized as cs.AI (2026 preprint). The abstract is absent, making direct evaluation impossible. The combination suggests either: (1) novel ML/AI application to CFD analysis, (2) miscategorization, or (3) preliminary work not yet peer-validated. Classification as FLOWING reflects provisional status pending abstract/content review.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 振動する立方体から放出される渦の署名は、内部の粘性と時間の呼吸のバランスが織りなす。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 丸まった立方体の周囲に、時間とともに脈動する分離の渦が踊り、位相の外で引き離される。
